rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE E.A. MARSHALL AND C.H. MARSHALL TRUST AND TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondents Scott Marshall And Christine Marshall Notice Of Motoin And Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production, Set No. Six, And For Sanctions Against Petitioner And Her Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Respondents Scott Marshall and Christine Marshall's Motions to Compel Responses to Request for Production of Documents Set No. 6 and No. 7 are DENIED. To the extent the responses are insufficient or incomplete, the parties are required to meet and confer no later than September 15, 2014. Respondents Scott Marshall and Christine Marshall reserve the right to move to compel further responses is needed. Sanctions in the amount of $930.00 are awarded to Respondents Scott Marshall and Christine Marshall. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to argue shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 3:00 p.m. on 9/2/2014.
